'''Zegret Wan''' was a [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the captain of the [[Ranphyxes]] [[Smashball/Legends|smashball]] team during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], in only his fourth season, he was close to gaining the smashball accolade of having 50 goals in 50 games. He had already gotten 50 goals in 54 games; his victory against the [[Belsavis Kretch]] just before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] was his 43rd goal in 35 games.
